FromStringDeserializer.java:deserialize — covers main class plus StringBuilderDeserializer and StringBufferDeserializer inner classes; the inner class overrides also call super.deserialize(p,ctxt) making them both overrides and call-sites
JsonNodeDeserializer.java:deserialize — covers main BaseNodeDeserializer/JsonNodeDeserializer plus ObjectDeserializer and ArrayDeserializer inner classes

UntypedObjectDeserializer.java:deserialize — covers main class plus Vanilla inner class (both override AND call sub-deserializers' deserialize); UntypedObjectDeserializer.deserializeWithType also calls sub-deserializer.deserialize and must change

SettableAnyProperty.java:deserialize — covers three separate methods in SettableAnyProperty base class plus JsonNodeFieldAnyProperty and JsonNodeParameterAnyProperty inner classes; these are NOT JsonDeserializer overrides but are call-sites (_valueDeserializer.deserialize(p,ctxt))

BeanDeserializerTest.java prism references at lines 244, 257, 272, 287 are inside modifyArrayDeserializer / modifyCollectionDeserializer / modifyMapDeserializer / modifyEnumDeserializer — these contain anonymous-class deserialize implementations; the anonymous-class deserialize methods are the actual sites, not the enclosing modifier methods

TokenBufferDeserializer.java:deserialize internally calls ctxt.bufferForInputBuffering(p).deserialize(p,ctxt) — receiver is TokenBuffer (extends JsonGenerator, not JsonDeserializer), so TokenBuffer.deserialize is NOT an override but its call may need to be revisited if the API contract changes
ObjectArrayDeserializer.java:deserialize — both the 2-param override (line 193) and the 3-param override (line 254) contain _elementDeserializer.deserialize(p,ctxt) calls; both overloads must change
EnumMapDeserializer.java:deserialize — both the 2-param (line 237) and 3-param (line 265) contain direct calls to sub-deserializer.deserialize(p,ctxt)

Dynamic dispatch: any JsonDeserializer subclass registered at runtime via Jackson modules outside this repository would also need to implement the new signature; those are not enumerable from this codebase alone
